---
title: "Construct analysis file"
author: Casey Breen
---

## Prepare analysis file 


Summary: Construct individual-level analysis file 

```{r}
library(here)
source(here("code", "helpers.R"))
```

## Read in data 

```{r}
# Birth recodes
dhs_birth_recode <- haven::read_dta(here("data", "NGBR7BFL.DTA"))

## Individual-level recodes
dhs_women_recode <- haven::read_dta(here("data", "NGIR7BFL.DTA"))

# Cluster to admin-2 xwalk and pick first 
xwalk <- read_csv(here("data", "xwalk_ng.csv")) %>%
  filter(v000 == "NG7") %>% 
  janitor::clean_names() %>% 
  group_by(v000, v001) %>%
  slice(1) %>%
  ungroup() 

# Cluster-level coverage
coverage_data_cluster <- read_csv(here("data", "coverage_indicators_allyears.csv")) %>%
  filter(source == "gsma", dhsyear %in% c(2018), dhscc == "NG") %>%
  mutate(v000 =  "NG7")

## Admin2-level coverage 
coverage_data_admin2 <- read_csv(here("data", "ng_adm2_coverage.csv")) %>% 
  janitor::clean_names() %>% 
  select(-x1) %>% 
  pivot_longer(-gid_2) %>% 
  mutate(name = substring(name, 15, 18)) %>% 
  rename(area_share_3g_admin2 = value, year = name) %>% 
  mutate(year = as.numeric(year)) %>% 
  mutate(v000 = "NG7") 

## individual-level covars 
timevarying_covars <-  read_csv(here("data", "time_variant_covariates_ng.csv"))
```


## create analysis file 

```{r}
# Expand person-years
expanded_data <- dhs_women_recode %>%
select(caseid,# caseid for individual women 
       v000,  # country code and phase 
       v001,  # cluster 
       v005,  # survey weights 
       v012,  # Age
       v212,  # Age at first birth
       v511,  # Age at first marriage
       v190,  # Household wealth index
       v025,  # Urban/rural
       v714,  # Employment status
       v106,  # Education
       v130,  # Religion
       v169a, # own mobile phone 
       v613,  # ideal number of children 
       v158,  # Frequency of listening to the radio
       v159,  # Frequency of watching television 
       v301,  # Birth control 
       v313,  # Birth control (none, traditional, modern)
       v743a, # Empowerment var 
       v743b, # Empowerment var 
       v743c, # Empowerment var 
       v743d, # Empowerment var 
       v743e, # Empowerment var 
       v743f, # Empowerment var 
       v739,  # who decides about partners earnings 
       v104,  # Frequency of watching television
       v024,  # Region 
       v525,  # Age first sex 
       v505,  # Number of alternative wives 
       v731   # Worked recently 
       ) %>%  
  crossing(year = 2005:2018)

# Reshape births to long
birth_long <- dhs_birth_recode %>%
  pivot_longer(starts_with("b3"), names_to = "birth_order", values_to = "b3") %>%
  filter(!is.na(b3)) %>%
  mutate(year = 1900 + floor((b3 - 1) / 12), 
         birth = 1, 
        infant_death = as.integer(b5 == 0 & b7 < 12)) %>%
  select(v000, caseid, year, birth, infant_death) 

# Merge and clean
birth_panel <- expanded_data %>%
  left_join(birth_long, by = c("v000", "caseid", "year")) %>%
  mutate(birth = replace_na(birth, 0)) %>%
  left_join(coverage_data_cluster, by = join_by(v000, v001, year)) %>%
  left_join(xwalk, by = c("v000", "v001")) %>%
  left_join(coverage_data_admin2, by = c("v000", "gid_2", "year")) %>% 
  left_join(timevarying_covars, by = c("v001", "year")) %>% 
  arrange(caseid, year) %>%
  group_by(caseid) %>%
  mutate(num_prev_children = cumsum(lag(birth, default = 0))) %>%
  ungroup() 

## Children prior to 2010 (for earlier window)
prev_children_pre_treatment <- birth_panel %>%
  filter(year == 2010) %>%
  group_by(caseid) %>%
  slice_max(order_by = year, with_ties = FALSE) %>%
  select(caseid, num_prev_children_pre_window = num_prev_children)

## Children prior to 2012 (for later window)
prev_children_pre_treatment_2012 <- birth_panel %>%
  filter(year == 2012) %>%
  group_by(caseid) %>%
  slice_max(order_by = year, with_ties = FALSE) %>%
  select(caseid, num_prev_children_pre_window_2012 = num_prev_children)

## Pre-period window counts from the birth history
window_counts <- birth_long %>%
  mutate(
    in_2005_2009 = year >= 2005 & year <= 2009,
    in_2010_2011 = year >= 2010 & year <= 2011
  ) %>%
  group_by(v000, caseid) %>%
  summarise(
    births_2005_2009 = sum(birth[in_2005_2009], na.rm = TRUE),
    births_2010_2011 = sum(birth[in_2010_2011], na.rm = TRUE),
    .groups = "drop"
  )

## Merge and compute clean window measure
birth_panel <- birth_panel %>%
  left_join(prev_children_pre_treatment, by = "caseid") %>%
  left_join(prev_children_pre_treatment_2012, by = "caseid") %>%
  left_join(window_counts, by = c("v000","caseid")) %>%
  mutate(
    num_prev_children_pre_window = coalesce(num_prev_children_pre_window, 0L),
    births_2005_2009 = coalesce(births_2005_2009, 0L),
    births_2010_2011 = coalesce(births_2010_2011, 0L)
  ) %>%
  filter(v000 == "NG7", year %in% 2010:2018) %>%
  mutate(sum_births_in_window = num_prev_children - num_prev_children_pre_window_2012)

## Only keep one record 
birth_panel <- birth_panel %>% 
  group_by(caseid, year) %>%
  slice(1) %>%  # keep the first row for each woman-year
  ungroup()

## Clean names 
birth_panel <- birth_panel %>% 
  janitor::clean_names()
```


## Write out 

```{r}
write_csv(birth_panel, here("data", "birth_panel.csv"))
```
